connectors.name: Local Files
connectors.description: Import files from local directories. Supports dry-run and copy-based import. Protected files (.env, .gitignore, .venv, etc.) are skipped.

connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.description: Offline stub — no network calls made. Real GitHub connector requires OAuth scoping design.

connectors.description: Offline stub — no network calls made. Real Jira connector requires OAuth scoping design.

connectors.name: Email
connectors.description: Offline stub — no network calls made. Real Email connector requires IMAP/OAuth design.
